sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_shapes (id INT PRIMARY KEY, shape GEOMETRY);
INSERT INTO geo_shapes (id, shape) VALUES (1, st_ewkt_read('POLYGON ((1 3, 2 4, 1 5, 0 4, 1 3))'));
UPDATE geo_shapes SET shape = st_ewkt_read('POLYGON ((2 3, 3 4, 2 5, 1 4, 2 3))') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT http_st_ewkt(shape, string_output()) FROM geo_shapes WHERE id = 1;
